title: How Shares Work
description: Students learn what shares actually are, how ownership rights work, the difference between ordinary and preference shares, IPOs, and how to buy and sell shares in NZ.
rationale: Deep dive into how shares actually work as financial instruments. Covers share types, shareholder rights, IPOs, and the practical mechanics of buying and selling in NZ.
learningObjectives: Explain what rights come with owning a share
Explain how an IPO works and why companies use them
Describe the mechanics of buying and selling shares in NZ
Calculate basic returns including brokerage costs
assessmentTask: Students describe the complete process of buying shares in a NZ company from account opening through to calculating total return after brokerage.

lessons.title: What Shareholder Rights Do You Get?
How to Buy and Sell Shares in NZ
Week 1 Challenge — Build Your Virtual Share Portfolio
Short Selling and Other Share Strategies
